title: Replicate time tracking in column effort spent

posts.author: Claire27 (Claire)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
Could you please duplicate the time tracking entrance into the column effort spent?
I don 't understand the logic to re-enter manually the real effort spent in the project dashoard since it is tracked in the time tracking solution

image1619×341 33.4 KB

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Claire, you can create a formula in a formula column that will simply display the value in the time tracking column.
